variants.title: RHK300M10B
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec RHK300M10B. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the RHK300M10B provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Return Filter, Media: Synthetic, Efficiency 1: 13µ @ β200, Efficiency 2: 15µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 94.5 mm, Inner Diameter: 48.1 mm, Length: 334.0 mm, Δ Collapse Pressure: 10 bar, Seal Material: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 13µ @ β200, Media Type: Synthetic, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Collapse Pressure: 10 BAR, Seal: Nitrile

variants.title: RHK300M10B
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter HD 954 Oil Filter | Replaces the Filtrec RHK300M10B
variants.description: MANN-FILTER oil filters: Top filtration performance and optimal cleaning protect the engine against wear caused by impurities and combustion residues in the oil. Filter media and high-quality sealing materials that are individually tailored to the intended application offer optimum protection over the entire maintenance interval.
specifications: Style: Oil Filter, Dimension A: 94.0 mm, Dimension B: 49.0 mm, Dimension C: 49.0 mm, Dimension H: 334.0 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 13µ @ β200, Efficiency 2: 15µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 94.5 mm, Inner Diameter: 48.1 mm, Length: 334.0 mm, Media Type: Synthetic, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Collapse Pressure: 10 BAR, Seal: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C
